title: Recommend irrigation products and services
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recommend irrigation products and services demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research and apply knowledge of store product range

pcs.text: Access relevant sources of information to develop irrigation product knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access relevant sources of information to develop irrigation product knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access relevant sources of information to develop irrigation product knowledge.

pcs.text: Identify products according to relevant product information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify products according to relevant product information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify products according to relevant product information.

pcs.text: Operate store products, machinery and equipment safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate store products, machinery and equipment safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate store products, machinery and equipment safely.

pcs.text: Apply knowledge of irrigation product range when recommending to clients
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply knowledge of irrigation product range when recommending to clients?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply knowledge of irrigation product range when recommending to clients.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research and apply knowledge of store product range

elements.title: Recommend irrigation products

pcs.text: Identify client irrigation needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify client irrigation needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify client irrigation needs.

pcs.text: Provide and explain details of product specifications to client to assist with buying decisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide and explain details of product specifications to client to assist with buying decisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide and explain details of product specifications to client to assist with buying decisions.

pcs.text: Explain features and benefits of products to client to create a buying environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain features and benefits of products to client to create a buying environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain features and benefits of products to client to create a buying environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Recommend irrigation products

elements.title: Estimate quantities

pcs.text: Estimate accurate quantities of irrigation products from measurements and information provided, according to product requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate accurate quantities of irrigation products from measurements and information provided, according to product requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate accurate quantities of irrigation products from measurements and information provided, according to product requirements.

pcs.text: Provide quotation based on estimated quantities to client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide quotation based on estimated quantities to client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide quotation based on estimated quantities to client.

elements.title: Advise on irrigation product warranties

pcs.text: Provide to client clear explanation of the comparisons between products and manufacturer warranties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide to client clear explanation of the comparisons between products and manufacturer warranties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide to client clear explanation of the comparisons between products and manufacturer warranties.

pcs.text: Confirm individual product warranty terms and conditions from relevant sources of information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm individual product warranty terms and conditions from relevant sources of information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm individual product warranty terms and conditions from relevant sources of information.

pcs.text: Provide to client written information regarding individual product warranty terms and conditions, including extended or promotional warranties

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide to client written information regarding individual product warranty terms and conditions, including extended or promotional warranties.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Advise on irrigation product warranties

elements.title: Negotiate price and payment options

pcs.text: Explain payment options, including store recommended retail pricing for various brand options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain payment options, including store recommended retail pricing for various brand options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain payment options, including store recommended retail pricing for various brand options.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate individual product prices where necessary to achieve sales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate individual product prices where necessary to achieve sales.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete sales documentation according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete sales documentation according to workplace requirements.

elements.title: Advise on and arrange product service and repairs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Question client to determine nature of product service or repair requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quote price and timeline for basic service or repairs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain client details and record on repair form.

pcs.text: Label item for repair and store securely according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label item for repair and store securely according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify client on completion of service or repair.
